title: Your First 60 Minutes with Claude for Finance
description: Go from never having used Claude to a fully configured, personalized AI finance assistant in one hour.

steps.title: Install the Claude desktop app (Minutes 0-5)
steps.content: Download the desktop app, not the website. The app unlocks Cowork, Skills, and local file access. Subscribe to Pro ($20/mo) or Max ($100+/mo).

steps.title: Choose your model and enable features (Minutes 5-10)
steps.content: Select Opus 4.6 for complex work or Sonnet 4.6 for everyday tasks. Turn on: Extended Thinking, Code Execution, Skills, Web Search, and Memory.

steps.title: Create three context files (Minutes 10-25)
steps.content:
This is the step most people skip, and it makes the biggest difference. Create three `.md` files:

- **about-me.md** — Your role, company, what you work on
- **my-rules.md** — How Claude should work with you (e.g., "always use traceable formulas, never hard-code assumptions")
- **my-templates.md** — Your preferred output formats (variance report structure, board deck layout, etc.)

steps.title: Set up Profile Preferences (Minutes 25-30)
steps.content: Write universal instructions that apply to every conversation. Write it once, never repeat yourself.

steps.title: Create your first Project (Minutes 30-45)
steps.content: Create a project folder. Upload your financials, board deck template, chart of accounts, and any recurring reports. Write custom instructions specific to this project.

steps.title: Configure your writing Style (Minutes 45-55)
steps.content: Upload 2-3 samples of your own writing (emails, memos, reports). Claude will match your tone and style going forward.

steps.title: Enable Memory and test with a real file (Minutes 55-60)
steps.content: Turn on Memory so Claude learns from your interactions over time. Upload a real financial file and run your first analysis. Watch how the context files shape the output.
